- Description: B4: Telegram photo/document passthrough (merged, deploy pending)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):

  Details:
  Roadmap B4 (truesight_autopilot#54): the Telegram bot now accepts photos/documents — adapter downloads the file to a shared path and injects it into the chat message so the agent's existing scan_qr_from_file/scan_qr_batch/read_local_file tools inspect it via the multi-round loop; captions become the message text. Also repaired 2 unit tests that went stale when handle_message switched to call_chat_with_progress (a concurrent DeepSeek change); 20 tests pass. Merged to main only — NOT deployed (autopilot is mid live market-research task; deploy deferred to operator).
  
  PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/54
